original_abstract: Business ethics serves as a foundational pillar for building resilient and competitive organizations. By integrating ethical consistency into strategic planning, structural organization, and procedural transparency, companies can cultivate a robust corporate culture. This study investigates the impact of ethical practices at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing, utilizing direct observation and qualitative interviews with employees to assess workplace dynamics. The findings demonstrate that a strong commitment to business ethics—specifically regarding transparency, fairness, and social responsibility—significantly enhances employee performance. By fostering a positive work environment built on trust and loyalty, ethical frameworks discourage stagnation and provide the necessary motivation for staff to work more efficiently. Ultimately, the research highlights that prioritizing ethical conduct is not merely a moral obligation but a strategic driver for improving work quality and overall organizational success.
humanized_abstract: Business ethics is a corner stone of a strong and competitive company. To have ethics of accountability as a guiding principle in all its strategic planning, structure and processes is crucial in building a strong corporate culture. This study aimed at examining the impact of ethics practiced by PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing. Through direct observation and through interviewing of employees, the study investigated the current working situation of the employees. The results of the study show that there is a strong correlation between ethical practice of accountability at PT. Nesia Pan Pacific Clothing with its practices of transparency, accountability and social responsibility and improved performance of its employees. A good working environment created through ethics of trust and loyalty was the key factor to the avoidance of the phenomenon of stagnation of employee performance and to the motivation to increase productivity. In addition, the company has a moral obligation, but also a strategic interest in implementing ethical principles that contribute to higher work productivity and to better performance of the company.
